details: The agent ran kubectl-axi commands against the cluster to inspect the deployment, pods, and pod details. It correctly identified both required facts: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False/ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the new v2 pod, while the old v1 pods continue serving traffic.
